steps.title: Separate the contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts Chambers's fame at Sugar Hill Records with the fact that he did not play on Rapper's Delight. The second idea is an independent clause.

steps.title: Punctuate however
steps.content: B is malformed, C creates a comma splice, and D runs the independent clauses together. The clean option sets off however and begins a new sentence for the second clause. The answer is A.
